channel.title: [Upcoming Workshop] How to Create a React Theme in 30 min - WordCamp for Devs in Seville
channel.description:
Hi there!
The first WordCamp for Devs is coming up in a few days in Seville (Spain). 👩‍💻
@David and @luisherranz from the Frontity team will be giving a workshop on **"How to Create a React Theme in less than 30 min"** on Friday **4th of October** at **17:45 PM**.
If you are planning to go to the conference, join them to learn more about Frontity and how to combine the power of a React frontend with WordPress. 💪
Please note that this event will be held in Spanish. Here's more information: https://2019-developers.sevilla.wordcamp.org/session/crea-un-tema-con-react-en-menos-de-30-minutos/.

item.title: [Upcoming Workshop] How to Create a React Theme in 30 min - WordCamp for Devs in Seville
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Hi there!

The first WordCamp for Devs is coming up in a few days in Seville (Spain).

@David and @luisherranz from the Frontity team will be giving a workshop on “How to Create a React Theme in less than 30 min” on Friday 4th of October at 17:45 PM.

If you are planning to go to the conference, join them to learn more about Frontity and how to combine the power of a React frontend with WordPress.

Please note that this event will be held in Spanish. Here’s more information: https://2019-developers.sevilla.wordcamp.org/session/crea-un-tema-con-react-en-menos-de-30-minutos/.

Read full topic
item.source: [Upcoming Workshop] How to Create a React Theme in 30 min - WordCamp for Devs in Seville
